items.name: direction
items.title: Direction
items.description: RTL/LTR direction provider — wraps Radix DirectionProvider to set text direction for the entire subtree.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Apple HIG chart — Recharts wrapper with rounded-2xl tooltip, backdrop-blur surface, rounded-full legend dots.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: Toggle Group
items.description: Apple HIG toggle group — rounded-2xl container, spacing=0 creates segmented-control attachment.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Apple HIG toggle button — 44pt, rounded-xl, primary fill when on, scale-press, default and outline variants.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Apple HIG textarea — rounded-xl, muted fill, 15pt, focus clears background for readability.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Apple HIG slider — 6pt track, white shadow thumb with scale-hover, primary fill range.

items.name: skeleton
items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Apple HIG skeleton — rounded-xl, muted pulse animation for loading placeholders.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Apple HIG select — 44pt height, rounded-xl muted trigger, rounded-2xl dropdown, primary checkmark.

items.name: scroll-area
items.title: Scroll Area
items.description: Apple HIG scroll area — thin 8pt scrollbar, rounded-full thumb, muted fill.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Apple HIG radio — 22pt circle, border-2, primary fill with white dot when selected, scale-press.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Apple HIG progress bar — 8pt height, rounded-full track and fill, 300ms ease-out animation.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Apple HIG popover — rounded-2xl, shadow-xl, 13pt body, optional title and description slots.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Apple HIG pagination — pill active page in primary, ghost ghosts, 44pt touch targets.

items.name: hover-card
items.title: Hover Card
items.description: Apple HIG hover card — rounded-2xl, 13pt text, shadow-xl, 300ms open delay.

items.name: dropdown-menu
items.title: Dropdown Menu
items.description: Apple HIG dropdown menu — rounded-2xl surface, 15pt items, 44pt minimum rows, uppercase section labels.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Apple HIG dialog — rounded-3xl, blur backdrop, 17pt semibold title, X close button top-right.

items.name: collapsible
items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Apple HIG collapsible — headless expand/collapse primitive, styled by the consumer.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Apple HIG checkbox — 22pt, 6px radius, bold check, scale-press, primary fill when checked.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Apple HIG breadcrumb — 13pt, chevron separator, pill hover on links, current page in medium weight.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Apple HIG avatar — circular, 40pt default, medium-weight fallback initials, badge and group variants.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: Alert Dialog
items.description: Apple HIG alert dialog — 270px wide, rounded-3xl, iOS-style footer buttons with separator.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Apple HIG alert — rounded-2xl, muted fill, 15pt semibold title, destructive uses Apple system red.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Apple HIG accordion — grouped list style, 44pt touch targets, smooth chevron rotation, drop-in replacement for shadcn Accordion.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Apple HIG button — pill shape, 44pt minimum, scale press, drop-in replacement for shadcn Button.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Apple HIG toggle — 51×31pt iOS dimensions, smooth thumb, drop-in replacement for shadcn Switch.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Apple HIG badge — full pill, semibold, destructive uses Apple system red, drop-in replacement for shadcn Badge.

items.name: card
items.title: Card
items.description: Apple HIG card — rounded-2xl, soft shadow, subtle ring, drop-in replacement for shadcn Card.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Apple HIG input — 44pt height, rounded-xl, subtle filled background, drop-in replacement for shadcn Input.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Apple HIG label — 15pt medium weight, tight tracking, drop-in replacement for shadcn Label.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Apple HIG separator — subtle 70% border opacity, drop-in replacement for shadcn Separator.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Apple HIG tabs — iOS segmented control style (default variant), pill container with white selected pill.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Apple HIG tooltip — dark rounded-lg pill with 12pt medium label, shadow-md, soft slide-in animation.

items.name: sheet
items.title: Sheet
items.description: Apple HIG sheet — rounded-3xl top/bottom variants with iOS grabber indicator, blur backdrop, side drawers.

items.name: kbd
items.title: Kbd
items.description: Keyboard shortcut indicator — small mono badge with subtle border and inset shadow.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Apple HIG horizontal scroll carousel — rounded-2xl slides, dots indicator, smooth Embla scroll, secondary nav buttons.

items.name: empty
items.title: Empty
items.description: Apple HIG empty-state pattern — large muted icon, 15pt title, 13pt description, action button slot.

items.name: spinner
items.title: Spinner
items.description: Apple HIG activity indicator — rounded-full ring-2 with arc animation. Matches iOS activity indicator. sm/default/lg sizes.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Apple HIG data table — 13px cells, hairline borders, uppercase 11px column headers, hover row bg-muted/40.

items.name: resizable
items.title: Resizable
items.description: Apple HIG split panes — 1px handle that widens to 4px on hover, ring-ring/50 on drag.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: Aspect Ratio
items.description: Pure utility wrapper — maintains a fixed aspect ratio for any child element.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: Input OTP
items.description: Apple HIG OTP input — rounded-xl cells, 44pt height, focus ring per cell, pulsing caret.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Apple HIG date grid — rounded-2xl container, circular day cells, today with primary/15 fill, muted weekday labels.

items.name: drawer
items.title: Drawer
items.description: Apple HIG bottom sheet — Vaul-based, rounded-t-3xl + iOS grabber, blur overlay, matches sheet surface style.

items.name: navigation-menu
items.title: Navigation Menu
items.description: Apple HIG horizontal nav — 13.5pt tight-tracking triggers, rounded-lg hover, rounded-2xl mega-menu viewport, no underline.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Apple HIG macOS-style menubar — rounded-xl container, rounded-2xl dropdowns, 15pt items, uppercase 11px section labels.

items.name: context-menu
items.title: Context Menu
items.description: Apple HIG right-click context menu — rounded-2xl, 15pt items, uppercase 11px labels. Mirrors dropdown-menu styling.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Apple HIG input group — rounded-xl container, 44pt height, prefix/suffix addons, dividers as bg-border/60.

items.name: command
items.title: Command
items.description: Apple HIG command palette — rounded-2xl modal, large search input, grouped sections with uppercase 11px labels.

items.name: sonner
items.title: Sonner
items.description: Apple HIG toast notifications — rounded-2xl, blur surface, subtle shadow, slide-in animation.

items.name: button-group
items.title: Button Group
items.description: Apple HIG button group — segmented attachment with rounded-xl shared shell, horizontal/vertical orientation.

items.name: field
items.title: Field
items.description: Apple HIG form field wrapper — 15pt label, 13pt description, destructive error, vertical/horizontal/responsive orientations.

items.name: item
items.title: Item
items.description: Apple HIG list item — rounded-xl, 15pt title, 13pt description, leading media slot (icon/image), trailing actions.

items.name: native-select
items.title: Native Select
items.description: Apple HIG native select wrapper — 44pt, rounded-xl, muted fill matching Input, chevron trailing.

items.name: typography
items.title: Typography
items.description: Apple HIG typography primitives — h1-h4, p, lead, large, small, muted, blockquote, inline code, list with SF Pro tracking.

items.name: combobox
items.title: Combobox
items.description: Apple HIG combobox — base-ui combobox composed with Input Group, rounded-2xl popover, primary checkmark on selection.

items.name: sidebar
items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Apple HIG sidebar — rounded-xl items, 13.5pt labels, collapsible sections, mobile sheet variant.
